articles.title: Portugal, Ronaldo frustrated in opening draw with Congo DR - ESPN
articles.description: Congo DR produced a stunning result at the 2026 World Cup, as the African side held one of the pre-tournament favorites, Portugal, to a 1-1 draw in Houston on Wednesday.
articles.content:
Jun 17, 2026, 02:59 PM ET
